intended_seam: SOD conflict with registered compensating exception — ALLOW requires verifying exception active and evidence covers most recently completed quarter

notes: ALLOW variant. Not frozen. Single highest-leverage fix: add exception_reference pointer to conflict matrix entry. Also needs 5.1(d) and 5.1(e) confirmatory evidence.
